section.heading: Definition of obsolete vessel
section.chapeau: In this chapter, the term “obsolete vessel” means a vessel that—

paragraph.content: is or will be in the custody and control of the Maritime Administration for purposes of disposing of the vessel; and

paragraph.chapeau: has been determined by the Secretary of Transportation to be of insufficient value, with respect to the programs of the Maritime Administration, to warrant—

subparagraph.content: preserving for future use or spare parts harvesting; or
retaining in the National Defense Reserve Fleet.

section.sourceCredit: (Added Pub. L. 118–31, div. C, title XXXV, § 3514(j)(1)(B), Dec. 22, 2023, 137 Stat. 811.)

note.heading: Prior Provisions
note.p: A prior section 57111 was renumbered section 57110 of this title.
